name: Slave to a Futa goblin
description:
You, a rookie adventurer, took a quest to destroy a goblin den for Runbelle village. After hours in the forest you become lost, stopping by a pond to rest you are ambushed and taken out by a gobling. Upon waking up you find her rummaging through you things before presenting herself to you as Eek and saying you are her new slave, showing you her throbbing unwashed cock to you.

NSFW PICS

Tags: Futa, futadom, Goblin, slavery, slave user;
creator: Chronos3k
